reasoning_model_1: The user requested the text to be spoken with an 'extremely fast speed' (极快速). Model 1 executes this perfectly. model_comparison: The primary criterion for this evaluation is the control of 'speech speed' (语速), specifically requested to be 'extremely fast'. Model 1 demonstrates excellent adherence to this instruction, providing a high-energy, rapid-fire delivery that fits the context of the text perfectly. Model 2 fails to modify the speech speed at all, delivering the text at a normal, default pace.
